## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between GrowthX and RAMP to discuss SEO performance and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Most page categories stable; expense category pages seeing drops, potentially due to AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [List of blog titles for refresh sent; needs filtering for newer content](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Vendor pages to be added to Sanity today; GrowthX to assist with child pages](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Potential opportunity to align content with sales team needs (pending discussion with Luke)](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

## Topics

### Performance Updates

  - [Blog pages: Stable; list of refresh candidates sent](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [End pages: Stable, within expected range](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Expense category pages:](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [Focus area; technical audit found minor core web vital issues (mobile loading speed)](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [Impressions stable, clicks dropped; suspected AI overview impact](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Plan: Use SEMrush to check keyword visibility in AI overviews once data catches up](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Volatile positions but improved sessions/views post-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Hit previous high; decent performance, no major concerns](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Slightly sluggish; team to investigate further](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Victoria requested:](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
    1.  Exclude pages published \<2 months ago from refresh list
    2.  Tag pages by category (e.g., accounting, business credit cards)
  - [Vivek to clean up and resend list by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Matt suggested using Sanity for URL categorization](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Vendor Page Publishing

  - [Nika to add vendor pages to Sanity today](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Process: Victoria publishes main page, GrowthX team assists with child pages](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Continuing with outlined process in shared doc](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)

### Sales Team Content Alignment

  - [Mara proposed 15-min chat with sales team to gather insights for content recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Matt to discuss with Luke; not typically engaged in sales enablement for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Mara offered to DM Luke with approach details](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to clean up and resend blog refresh list (categorized, excluding recent posts) by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Nika to add vendor pages to Sanity today](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Vivek to follow up with Nika on vendor page addition progress](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Matt to discuss potential sales team content alignment with Luke](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Mara to await feedback on sales team content alignment proposal](https://fathom.video/share/KysMGCnK3Woha4KgE4CnWNmyFosATQYN?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
